name: control mapping validator rejects a legal_review_status value outside the pending reviewed_by not-applicable enum
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-control-mapping.sh" --controls controls.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'legal_review_status' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
setup:
printf '%b
' '- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]
  legal_review_status: made-up-status' > controls.yaml
